# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Namespace for microservices with Istio service mesh"

---
# Frontend Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Frontend service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend-service
        version: v1
        mesh: istio
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection for this deployment
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Configure sidecar proxy resource limits
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
        # Configure traffic interception
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8080"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "443"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: myregistry/frontend-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "frontend-service"
            - name: BACKEND_API_URL
              value: "http://backend-api-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8081"
            - name: ORDER_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8082"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
    mesh: istio
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: frontend-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP

---
# Backend API Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with custom config
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Backend API service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled and custom settings"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api-service
        version: v1
        mesh: istio
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Custom sidecar proxy resource allocation for API service
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "1000m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        # Configure log level for proxy debugging
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "warning"
        sidecar.istio.io/componentLogLevel: "misc:error"
        # Include specific inbound ports for traffic interception
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8081,9090"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundIPRanges: "10.0.0.0/8"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: myregistry/backend-api-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /actuator/health
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 45
            periodSeconds: 15
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /actuator/health/readiness
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "backend-api-service"
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              value: "database-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: DATABASE_PORT
              value: "5432"
            - name: CACHE_HOST
              value: "cache-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: CACHE_PORT
              value: "6379"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
    mesh: istio
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: backend-api-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP

---
# Order Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with mTLS strict
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Order processing service with Istio sidecar and strict mTLS"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
        version: v1
        mesh: istio
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Sidecar resource configuration for order processing
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "192Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "750m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "384Mi"
        # Enable access logging on the sidecar
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "info"
        # Define inbound traffic interception
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8082"
        # Exclude database direct connections from proxy
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "5432,6379"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: myregistry/order-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "300m"
              memory: "384Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "750m"
              memory: "768Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/liveness
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 40
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/readiness
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "order-service"
            - name: PAYMENT_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8083"
            - name: NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8084"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: istio
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      protocol: TCP

---
# Payment Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with strict security
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Payment processing service with enhanced Istio sidecar security"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service
        version: v1
        mesh: istio
        security: high
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection for secure payment processing
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Higher resource allocation for payment service proxy
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "250m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "1000m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        # Detailed logging for audit and compliance
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "info"
        sidecar.istio.io/componentLogLevel: "rbac:info,filter:info"
        # Restrict traffic interception to payment port only
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8083"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeOutboundIPRanges: "10.96.0.0/12"
        # Enable hold application until proxy starts for security
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          terminationDrainDuration: 30s
          concurrency: 2
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: myregistry/payment-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 15
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "payment-service"
            - name: PAYMENT_GATEWAY_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: payment-secrets
                  key: gateway-url
          volumeMounts:
            - name: payment-tls-certs
              mountPath: /etc/payment/certs
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: payment-tls-certs
          secret:
            secretName: payment-tls-secret

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: istio
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: payment-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      protocol: TCP

---
# Notification Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Notification service with Istio sidecar for email and push notifications"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification-service
        version: v1
        mesh: istio
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Lightweight proxy config for notification service
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "warning"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8084"
        # Allow external SMTP and push notification services
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "587,2525"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: myregistry/notification-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8084
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "notification-service"
            - name: SMTP_HOST
              value: "smtp.external-provider.com"
            - name: SMTP_PORT
              value: "587"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: istio
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: notification-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8084
      targetPort: 8084
      protocol: TCP

---
# Database Service - Istio sidecar injection DISABLED (external dependency)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
    version: v1
    mesh: none
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Database proxy service - Istio sidecar injection explicitly disabled"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-service
        version: v1
        mesh: none
      annotations:
        # Explicitly DISABLE Istio sidecar proxy injection for database service
        # Database connections handle their own TLS and connection pooling
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: pgbouncer
          image: pgbouncer/pgbouncer:1.21.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
              name: postgres
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 5432
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 5432
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: database-service
  ports:
    - name: postgres
      port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP

---
# Cache Service - Istio sidecar injection DISABLED (performance-critical)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache-service
    version: v1
    mesh: none
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Redis cache service - Istio sidecar injection disabled to minimize latency"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache-service
        version: v1
        mesh: none
      annotations:
        # Explicitly DISABLE Istio sidecar proxy injection for cache service
        # Sidecar proxy adds latency not acceptable for caching layer
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: cache-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: redis
          image: redis:7.2-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: redis
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - redis-cli
                - ping
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: cache-service
  ports:
    - name: redis
      port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      protocol: TCP

---
# Service Accounts for each microservice
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: cache-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache-service

---
# Istio PeerAuthentication - Enforce strict mTLS across the namespace
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-mtls-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
# Istio DestinationRule - Enable mTLS for all services in the mesh
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default-mesh-mtls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  host: "*.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 1000

---
# Istio Sidecar resource - Limit egress scope for all sidecars in namespace
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-sidecar-config
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "./*"
        - "istio-system/*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
